name: hivetechs-website
description: HiveTechs.io website - Next.js 14 + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + Paddle
notes: Complete set for HiveTechs website development including Next.js App Router, Cloudflare Workers edge deployment, D1 database, Paddle payment integration, SMTP2GO email service, and cross-platform compatibility validation (Node.js dev vs Workers production)

keyPatterns.deployment: Always verify Node.js vs Cloudflare Workers compatibility before deploying
